name: fiveagents-link
description: Marketing agent — research, create, design, analyze, publish content for any brand

fiveagents_api_key.description: Your fiveagents.io API key (fa_live_... — from admin dashboard)

default_brand.description: Your primary brand name (must match a folder in brands/)

slack_notify_user.description: Your Slack user ID for notifications (e.g. U01234ABCDE)

report_email.description: Email address for daily/weekly marketing reports

late_api_key.description: Zernio API key for social media publishing — also store in dashboard for Cowork use

gemini_api_key.description: Google Gemini API key for image generation — also store in dashboard for Cowork use

argil_api_key.description: Argil API key for AI avatar videos (optional) — also store in dashboard for Cowork use

dataforseo_login.description: DataforSEO login email (optional) — also store in dashboard for Cowork use

dataforseo_password.description: DataforSEO password (optional) — also store in dashboard for Cowork use
